release_notes:
🚀 Instant Launch & Stability Patch (1.3.2)

- ⚡ Lightning Fast Startup: Slashed the artificial splash screen wait time by 60%.
- 🛠️ Emulator/Android 13+ Fix: Fixed a critical bug where the app would hang on the native white splash screen on launch.
- 🔔 Notification Engine: Rebuilt background services for exact Adhan triggers.
